title: Roadhouse Country
summary: 108 BPM country roadhouse jam - twangy telecaster, slap bass, brushed drums, fiddle hook.
prompt: A foot-stomping country roadhouse instrumental at 108 BPM. Twangy telecaster with chicken-pickin' bends, slap upright bass keeping a walking line, brushed snare with kick-snare-kick-snare swing, lonesome fiddle melody on top, occasional pedal-steel cry. Contemporary honky-tonk Texas dancehall energy - bright, danceable, americana spirit.
